replies.msg:
Entry Requirements:

A Bachelor Degree in Computer Science, or equivalent;
Level 2 or above in Chinese Language and English Language in the Hong Kong Diploma of Secondary Education Examination (HKDSEE), or equivalent;
At least 3 years’ post-qualification related experience in user support, server administration, IT project implementation, maintenance, documentation and user training;
Solid experience in core Windows infrastructure, including Active Directory, certificate services, SCCM, WSUS, GPOs;
Solid experience in with Hypervisor Virtualization such as VMware ESXi or Microsoft Hyper-V, Backup and antivirus software;
Knowledge in networking and firewall, Citrix Netscaler and XenDesktop will be an advantage;
In possession of industrial certifications, e.g. CCNA, MCSE, etc. will be an advantage;
Able to work independently and as a team player; and
Good communication, interpersonal and analytical skills.
